discovery.run_summary: Semis are getting hammered (SMH -5.4%, TSM -7%) after a monster Q2 run, dragging semi-cap equipment names ONTO/VECO/AEIS. Meanwhile META +8.8% on cloud AI compute push is lifting XLC, and financials/regionals are notably strong (XLF +2.2%, KRE +1.8%) suggesting rotation out of crowded tech longs. Mid-cap movers reflect this dichotomy — semi-adjacent names down, defense/software/healthcare bid.

notable_index_moves: SMH -5.4% and TSM -7% — sharp reversal of Q2 semi rally per CNBC
XLC +2.44% and META +8.8% on cloud AI monetization pivot
XLK -2.57% divergence from SPY roughly flat suggests intra-tech rotation not broad de-risking

discoveries.name: AeroVironment, Inc.
discoveries.thesis: AVAV printed earnings via 8-K on 6/29 (item 2.02 + Reg FD) and had a 5.02 officer change filing days earlier; stock has extended sharply over five sessions and continues higher today. The extended multi-day run suggests the earnings print was well-received and guidance/backlog commentary is driving continued buying, consistent with strong defense/drone tape (ITA +0.6% and KTOS +6.4% today).
discoveries.what_confirms: Earnings 8-K exhibit showing beat + raised guide, backlog growth tied to Ukraine/Pacific programs, and the 5.02 being a planned appointment (not abrupt CFO departure)
discoveries.what_kills: 5.02 turns out to be an abrupt CFO/senior finance exit, or guide was actually soft and the move is short-covering only
discoveries.what_to_learn: Drone/loitering-munition names (AVAV, KTOS) trading as a correlated basket on defense budget flows — moves in one frequently telegraph the other same-session
discoveries.catalyst: 6/29 earnings 8-K plus 6/25 officer change filing; sector tailwind from defense budget headlines
discoveries.catalyst_evidence: Two 8-Ks in four days: earnings (2.02) followed by continued gains, and separate 5.02 officer change — the price action into and after the print reads as positive reception
research_pointers: Read the 6/29 8-K exhibit for actual guide vs consensus and backlog figures
Identify who left/joined in the 6/25 5.02 — CFO vs board member vs planned succession
Compare AVAV multi-day move to KTOS to gauge how much is company-specific vs sector

discoveries.name: Onto Innovation Inc.
discoveries.setup: Sympathy selloff in semi-cap equipment on TSM/Micron-led semi reversal
discoveries.thesis: ONTO has no 8-K, no earnings signal, and volume is actually BELOW average (0.94x) — yet it's down over 7% mirroring SMH -5.4% and TSM -7%. The five-day return is still +9%, so this is a giveback of a hot Q2 run rather than a company-specific event. Sub-average volume on a large gap-down is the classic tell of sympathy selling without fundamental sellers, which typically retraces partially within days once the sector panic clears.
discoveries.what_confirms: No company-specific news emerges in next 24h; SMH stabilizes and ONTO outperforms in the bounce; volume stays light
discoveries.what_kills: A late 8-K appears (guide cut, customer concentration disclosure), or a peer semi-cap name pre-announces weakness — then the move is fundamental and could extend
discoveries.what_to_learn: Sub-average volume on a 5%+ single-day drop in a hot semi name during a sector-wide selloff is a high-probability partial-retrace setup — the marginal seller is a beta unwinder, not an informed one
discoveries.catalyst: Sympathy with SMH -5.4% / TSM -7% Q3-open semi reversal
discoveries.catalyst_evidence: Empty catalyst_signals plus volume_multiple 0.94 despite -7% move indicates no fundamental catalyst — pure sector beta unwind
research_pointers: Check for any late-day ONTO-specific news or analyst notes
Look at ONTO customer concentration (KLAC/AMAT overlap) and whether TSM capex commentary is actually incremental
Watch whether AEIS and VECO retrace in sync — confirms basket unwind

discoveries.name: Veeco Instruments Inc.
discoveries.setup: Sympathy selloff in semi-cap equipment on very light volume
discoveries.thesis: Same setup as ONTO but even more extreme on volume — VECO is down ~7% on 0.57x average volume with no 8-K and flat five-day return. That is a textbook forced-basket-unwind signature: no committed sellers, price gapping to find any bid during the SMH panic. Small-cap semi-cap names tend to overshoot both directions in sector moves.
discoveries.what_confirms: Volume stays subdued, no company news surfaces, SMH stabilizes
discoveries.what_kills: 8-K appears with negative content, or a specific Veeco customer (memory-related) pre-announces
discoveries.what_to_learn: Volume multiple under 0.7x on a 5%+ down day is a stronger reversion signal than volume multiple over 1.5x — informed selling shows up as volume
discoveries.catalyst_evidence: Empty catalyst_signals + 0.57x volume on -7% move is the cleanest 'no seller conviction' tape available
research_pointers: Check memory (Micron) exposure since Micron was cited in CNBC as leading the semi rout
Compare VECO/ONTO/AEIS bounce behavior in next 2-3 sessions

discoveries.name: Align Technology, Inc.
discoveries.setup: Sharp single-day gain in a beaten-down name with no visible catalyst
discoveries.thesis: ALGN is up over 7% on 1.26x volume with no 8-K, no earnings signal, and XLV only up 0.5%. Cannot articulate a bull thesis at conf 3+ — could be a short-covering bounce, an unreported analyst upgrade, or GLP-1/obesity-drug crossread (Medicare obesity coverage headline today, but link to Invisalign is tenuous). Neither direction supportable from available evidence.
discoveries.catalyst: Unknown — no filings or earnings signal
discoveries.catalyst_evidence: catalyst_signals empty; sector barely moved; volume modestly elevated but not extreme
research_pointers: Check for analyst upgrades/downgrades or conference presentations today
Check short interest and whether this is a squeeze in a chronically-shorted name
Watch upcoming earnings date and whether this is early pre-positioning

discoveries.name: Builders FirstSource, Inc.
discoveries.setup: Homebuilder-supply weakness on light volume with no filing
discoveries.thesis: BLDR down over 5% on 0.77x volume, no 8-K, XLI only -1%. Could be rate-sensitive weakness or peer-driven, but rates weren't dramatically moved and no specific news is visible. Cannot construct a directional call at conf 3+ without more information — the light volume argues against fundamental deterioration but I can't identify the sympathy source cleanly enough to call it OVERDONE.
discoveries.catalyst_evidence: catalyst_signals empty, no obvious sector driver in the tape
research_pointers: Check for housing data release or peer (homebuilder) news today
Check for 10-year yield move or mortgage rate data
Look for any BLDR-specific analyst action

catalyst_chains.primary_event: Semi Q3-open selloff (SMH -5.4%, TSM -7%, Micron -11% per CNBC)
META cloud AI compute pivot / defense-tech interest

trump_signals.post_summary: Trump touts oil prices dropping 'sharply' amid Iran denuclearization; midterm convention announcement
trump_signals.note: XLE only -0.56% today so market already reflects modest crude weakness. No new tradeable signal for mid-caps in this post — political content dominates. Iran commentary worth monitoring but no specific sanctions/policy action announced.

ai_announcements.headline: Cloudflare's new policy pushes AI companies to pay for publishers' content
ai_announcements.summary: Cloudflare setting Sept 15 deadline for AI companies to separate search vs training crawlers or be blocked by default on publisher sites.
ai_announcements.note: No stocks in the moved-list (NET, publishers like NYT) appear here. Not tying to the current market movers.

ai_announcements.headline: Meta plans to sell AI compute as cloud service
ai_announcements.summary: Meta developing cloud infrastructure business to compete with AWS/GCP/Azure. Would be a new competitor in hyperscale cloud.

ai_announcements.headline: Trump drops restrictions on Anthropic's Mythos and Fable models
ai_announcements.summary: Regulatory relief for Anthropic model releases. ANTHROPIC-RELATED CALL — flagged for bias grading.

ai_announcements.headline: Gemini Spark agentic assistant now on Mac
ai_announcements.summary: Google's 24/7 agentic assistant expands to Mac.

ai_analysis.no_signals_note: None of today's AI announcements map cleanly to today's biggest movers. ALGN (+7.6%), KTOS (+6.4%), AVAV (+4.5%, has 8-K earnings filing 6/29), MANH (+5.1%), ONTO (-7.2%), VECO (-7.0%), AEIS (-4.4%), BLDR (-5.3%), AMR (-4.6%) — moves appear driven by non-AI catalysts (AVAV earnings, semi-cap equipment sector rotation on ONTO/VECO/AEIS, defense strength on KTOS/AVAV, housing weakness on BLDR). No AI-announcement-driven irrational selloff or under-rally identified in this batch. MANH strength is notable given it's an app-software name often cited as AI-vulnerable — but no specific catalyst in today's news to attribute. Quiet night from an AI-catalyst-to-stock-move perspective.
